props.ChoiceText: Your piece failed at the worst possible moment, and you learned how quickly drill becomes panic when the spark does not catch.
props.ChoiceBio: A failed spark in the line taught you how quickly drill turns to panic when the powder does not answer.

0.TransitionText: Because a misfire in the line taught you that gunpowder discipline begins with accepting how little mercy powder offers, powder, discipline, and nerve remained your chosen life.
0.TransitionPrompt: This could carry you into Musketeer, but you may remain on your current path instead.

1.TransitionText: Because a misfire in the line taught you that gunpowder discipline begins with accepting how little mercy powder offers, fortune stripped away distinction and returned you to plain soldiering.
1.TransitionPrompt: This could carry you into Infantry, but you may remain on your current path instead.

2.TransitionText: Because a misfire in the line taught you that gunpowder discipline begins with accepting how little mercy powder offers, skill at arms became something you sold wherever the pay held.
2.TransitionPrompt: This could carry you into Mercenary, but you may remain on your current path instead.
